Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: For their season finale, Paul and Ray tackle a remote lake adventure with a precarious beaver dam to navigate. With help from Dan and Ben, the team enjoys a day full of thrilling walleye and bass fishing. The perfect finish? A shore lunch at camp with Outdoor Flavours adding unforgettable flavor to their catch.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Remote Lake Showdown

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace spend the day on Lake Vermilion catching smallmouth bass in the shallows on classic tubes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Shallow Water Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shaw teaches an in-depth course on fishing crankbaits in and around weeds.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Crankbait Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew head down to East Cape, also know as the gem of Baja Mexico and stay at Hotel Buena Vista Beach Resort for the fifth year in a row. After checking in, we head off for some epic tuna and marlin fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing — Hot Bite in Baja
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Father Son Challenge Part 1
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Father Son Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jeremy Smith and Dan Lindner demonstrate how finding and catching magnum-sized mid-summer crappies can be easier than you think
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Summertime Crappies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul heads out to Lake Huron with some local anglers out of the Spanish Marina
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Big Water Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al and James Lindner use the new Rapala PXR Mavrik 110 Jerkbait to catch both smallmouth and walleyes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Multispecies Mavriks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Before the age of 23, U.S. Marine Jeff Francis filled out a total of three wills. His tours of duty not only protected our freedom but also created positive change for a country in need. When he came home, the transition back into civilian life proved to be difficult. For Jeff, his service dog Fox has become much more than just man's best friend.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Marine Veteran Jeff Francis and Fox
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Toads on Top
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Toads on Top
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Spring walleye fishing on Kenogamissi Lake. A friendly husband vs wives challenge.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Spring Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew take a two and a half-day trip on one of our all-time favorite charter boats, the El Dorado, out of Long Beach Sportfishing. We fish on San Clemente Island and venture offshore in search of tuna.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Bluefin Tuna and Yellowtail Fishing on the El Dorado
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman’s Pro Vs Joe South Florida Canals1
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro Vs Joe - South Florida Canals1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew head down to one of our all-time favorite offshore fishing destinations, Madalena Bay, Mexico, to fish with Mag Bay Lodge for Marlin and other pelagic fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - The Magdalena Bay Experience
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week's show we're finally back on the ice and nothing better to make sure all your gear is set to go without bringing everything on about 3 inches of ice safety is everything!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | First Ice 130+ Flags in the U.P.

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | First Ice 130+ Flags in the U.P.
Larry Smith Outdoors | First Ice 130+ Flags in the U.P.
Larry Smith Outdoors | First Ice 130+ Flags in the U.P.

Video.summary: The night bite in Sturgeon Bay is on fire! In this week's episode, we’re meeting with our good friends Lonney Goman from Greenbay Trophy Fishing and Scott Meiller from Rebel Converting to catch some walleye. Hold onto your hineys folks, this will be a long night!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Night Fishing Walleye

Video.summary: Bass fishing in late summer can be tough, watch as Dusing shows ways to overcome the tough conditions.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Late Summer Bass Smash
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Finding Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you how easy it is to build 3 different fish catching spinnerbaits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building Spinnerbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim visits Cast Industries to see how lure molds are made. Then he visits Lure Parts Online to show you how to pour your own soft plastic baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Making Lure Molds & Pouring soft plastics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dusitn takes on classic Fall conditions explaining the best ways to approach bass throughout the day.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Fall Changes
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In today’s episode of Stoked on Fishing, we're aboard the 85ft El Dorado, experiencing the unpredictability of summertime fishing off the West Coast
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | 2.5-Day Party Boat Fishing Trip on the El Dorado
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks fishing & duck hunting with MLF Pro Zack Birge
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Zack Birge
Video.title: Episode 1
